title: Per-model adapter assignment registry + register-time binding
goal: Implement the per-model adapter registry: at model registration time the operator picks WHICH runtime (LlamaCppRuntime or CandleRuntime) hosts a given model; re-binding requires unload + re-register (per AC-CANDLE-ADAPTER). The registry is durable authority via KERNEL-002 WriteBoxV1.
expected_diff_shape: New src/backend/handshake_core/src/model_runtime/registry.rs with ModelRegistry, ModelRegistration, RuntimeBinding; KERNEL-002 KernelActionCatalogV1 action `kernel.model_runtime.register_model`; WriteBoxV1 persistence path.
unblock_conditions: MT-062 trait + MT-066 invariant enforcement merged.
implementation_notes: Per operator decision E-3 (refinement.json) and AC-LLAMACPP-ADAPTER + AC-CANDLE-ADAPTER: a model is bound to exactly one adapter at register time; re-binding requires unload + re-register. ModelRegistration: `{ model_id: ModelId, artifact_path: PathBuf, sha256: [u8;32], runtime_binding: RuntimeBinding (enum LlamaCpp|Candle), declared_capabilities: ModelCapabilities, base_model_tag: BaseModelTag, registered_at_utc: DateTime<Utc>, registered_by: OperatorId, provider: ProviderKind }`. ModelRegistry: `register(reg: ModelRegistration) -> Result<(), ModelRuntimeError>`; `lookup(id: ModelId) -> Option<&ModelRegistration>`; `list() -> Vec<&ModelRegistration>`; `rebind(id: ModelId, new_binding: RuntimeBinding) -> Result<(), ModelRuntimeError>` returns Err if the model is currently loaded (caller must unload first). Persistence: ModelRegistry is materialized through KERNEL-002 KernelActionCatalogV1 via a new action `kernel.model_runtime.register_model { reg: ModelRegistration }`; the action lands in WriteBoxV1 and is the only mutation path. Reads go through `kernel.model_runtime.list_registrations()` query action. CapabilityEnforcement: ModelRegistration.declared_capabilities MUST be consistent with runtime_binding — e.g., a Candle binding may declare supports_activation_steering=true; a LlamaCpp binding must declare supports_activation_steering=false (enforced at register). registered_by field threads operator identity for audit (HBR-INT-006 obligations on writes). Tests: register a LlamaCpp model; lookup returns it; rebind while loaded returns Err; rebind after unload succeeds; register with capability/binding mismatch returns Err. ModelId minted via now_v7() (HBR-INT-008).
risk_if_missed: Adapter-per-model assignment becomes implicit; operator cannot pin a model to its hook-bearing runtime; LoraCompat across adapters drifts.
validator_focus: Capability/binding consistency enforced at register; rebind requires unload; KernelActionCatalogV1 is the only mutation path; reads are query-only.

minimum_controls: Register-time capability/binding mismatch rejected (LlamaCpp + supports_activation_steering=true fails).
Rebind-while-loaded returns Err with explicit reason.
All mutations route through KernelActionCatalogV1 (grep test asserts no direct writes).
